judge_result.short_rationale: The answer correctly tells the worker to remove contaminated clothing and rinse/wash the skin, but it misses the required immediate action to call a doctor or poison control center for any skin exposure. It instead weakens escalation to only if irritation persists and adds unsupported advice about neutralizing agents and consulting the label.
